title: Add fuctionality for first column to be a Mirror Column

posts.author: NeelPi (Neel Pai)
posts.cookedHtml: With the way my Team uses monday as a CRM Platform we continue to find ourselves duplicating information. Our scenario looks like this, Board 1 has high level information about a client, board two has information which drills down on certain specific information from Board 1. The name column on both boards are identical, however the only way to bring information from one board to another is using a mirror column, this creates duplicate information between our two boards. In our ideal scenario instead of having the name column on Board 2 be our clients name it would be amazing if that column could be a mirror column which allows for more refined data extension between the two boards and removes the need for redundant information across both boards.
